fullText:
Decepticoaster (Simplified Chinese: 霸天虎过山车) is a B&M steel launched roller coaster located at Universal Studios Beijing in Tongzhou, Beijing, China. It is a clone of The Incredible Hulk Coaster at Universal's Islands of Adventure.

Decepticoaster opened on 20 September 2021.

The ride is based on the Transformers films and resides in the Metrobase area of the park. Riders join the autobots for a journey through the Driller.
